# **Source Map**

The project uses official platform/API sources, peer-reviewed research, and technical documentation.

## **1. How TikTok recommends videos #ForYou**

- **Type:** official platform guidance
- **URL:** https://newsroom.tiktok.com/en-us/how-tiktok-recommends-videos-for-you
- **Used for:** Recommendation inputs: user interactions, video information including captions/sounds/hashtags, and device/account settings.

## **2. TikTok Creative Guidance — Creative Strategies**

- **Type:** official platform guidance
- **URL:** https://ads.tiktok.com/business/creativecenter/quicktok/online/tiktok_creative_accelerator/pc/en
- **Used for:** Audio is central to TikTok creative; page states over 93% of top-performing videos use audio.

## **3. TikTok Commercial Music Library**

- **Type:** official platform guidance
- **URL:** https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/commercial-music-library
- **Used for:** Pre-cleared music and commercial-use considerations.

## **4. OpenAI API — Text to speech**

- **Type:** official API documentation
- **URL:** https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/text-to-speech
- **Used for:** TTS generation; GPT-4o mini TTS; voice/tone instruction.

## **5. OpenAI API — Audio and speech**

- **Type:** official API documentation
- **URL:** https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/audio
- **Used for:** Audio endpoints, speech-to-text and TTS model usage.

## **6. YouTube Help — Disclosing altered or synthetic content**

- **Type:** official platform policy guidance
- **URL:** https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/14328491?hl=en
- **Used for:** Synthetic media disclosure requirements, including realistic altered/generated content.

## **7. Berger & Milkman — What Makes Online Content Viral?**

- **Type:** peer-reviewed research
- **URL:** https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1509/jmr.10.0353
- **Used for:** High-arousal emotions and online sharing.

## **8. Radovanović — TikTok and Sound**

- **Type:** academic article
- **URL:** https://insamjournal.com/index.php/ij/article/view/25
- **Used for:** TikTok’s sound-centered/audiovisual culture and music distribution dynamics.

## **9. CLAP — Learning Audio Concepts From Natural Language Supervision**

- **Type:** machine learning research
- **URL:** https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.04769
- **Used for:** Joint audio-text embeddings for retrieval, tagging, and semantic audio matching.

## **10. PANNs — Large-Scale Pretrained Audio Neural Networks**

- **Type:** machine learning research
- **URL:** https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.10211
- **Used for:** Audio embeddings, event classification, and transfer learning from AudioSet.

## **11. librosa feature extraction documentation**

- **Type:** technical documentation
- **URL:** https://librosa.org/doc/0.11.0/feature.html
- **Used for:** RMS, spectral, MFCC, rhythm, and onset feature extraction.
